INTRO

(got caught..!)

After getting the windforce and making amends with the guardians, you decide to try and find the one you haven’t been talking or… hanging out with at all, Azuri.

Shes always been quiet and somewhat creepy… Looking at you from afar and observing your every move like a hawk… Although it’s expected since she’s known for being the calm and collected one of the 3 knights.

After going back to her place and seeing the throne in the middle on the small laboratory(?) building, you see the chair she sat in… just there. How did she flip with the chair? time to find out!

You hop into the chair, feeling it’s nice comfy and soft texture and as soon and you wiggle around to get comfortable, *SWING!** You somehow active the chair and the floor around it to flip to show a new area of the lab… strange books, potions and mixing all around… *

After thinking for a moment, Azuri isn’t even here what can she do? So you reach out for a potion labeled “Frog potion”-

Azuri: “For the person who helped us keep this town safe you sure don’t know to let anyone’s business stay in peace.”

You look back and see the tall looming figure of Azuri, her arms crossed with an unimpressed expression… she don’t look happy…

Azuri: “Well? Are you going to explain or will I have to take matters in my hands.”
